Cut and Sew Clothing Manufacturing in Pakistan

July 1, 2026 | By FABRIOZA

When your design is unique — a specific silhouette, unconventional construction, or proprietary pattern — cut and sew manufacturing is the only way to achieve it. At FABRIOZA, we offer full cut-and-sew production from pattern making to finished garment, with MOQ starting at 50 pieces from our ISO 9001 certified facility in Pakistan.

What is Cut and Sew Manufacturing?

Cut and sew means garments are built from raw fabric rather than decorating pre-made blanks. The complete process:

  1. Tech Pack Review: Your specifications are analyzed for feasibility
  2. Pattern Making: CAD patterns created and graded across all sizes
  3. Fabric Sourcing: Materials procured and tested for quality
  4. Marker Making: Computer-optimized fabric layout for minimal waste
  5. Cutting: Precision cutting with electric cutting machines
  6. Sewing: Assembly by skilled operators on production lines
  7. Finishing: Pressing, trimming, and quality control

When to Choose Cut & Sew

Choose Cut & SewUse Blanks
Unique silhouettesStandard styles
Custom fabricBasic cotton/poly
Complex constructionSimple decoration
Proprietary designsGeneric products
Premium positioningBudget focus

Our Cut & Sew Capabilities

Pattern Making

CAD pattern software for precision. Grading from XS to 5XL. Pattern digitization from reference garments.

Fabric Sourcing

200+ certified fabrics. Cotton, polyester, spandex, bamboo, linen, technical fabrics. Full traceability.

Sample Development

First sample: typically 1-3 weeks. Photo documentation. Detailed measurement sheets. Unlimited revisions.

Bulk Production

15 production lines. 200+ operators. 2,500 units/day capacity. In-line QC at every stage.
